subject: Routing dashboard escalation and renewal follow-up
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Logan and Nina,

We’ve escalated the routing dashboard issue and will share a confirmed resolution plan and owner by Monday. We will avoid calling this an SLA guarantee until contract language is reviewed.

We will also send an executive-ready status update by May 30 so Shawn and Morgan have a clear view before June renewal review.

Nina, please send affected route IDs by Thursday, May 21, so Support can reproduce the nightly sync issue across regions.

Best,
Jordan

subject: Re: Routing dashboard escalation and renewal follow-up
bodyMarkdown:
Jordan,

I will send the affected route IDs by Thursday, May 21. Please include any workaround steps in the Monday plan if the root cause is not fully resolved.

Nina

subject: Re: Routing dashboard escalation and renewal follow-up
bodyMarkdown:
Jordan,

If the dashboard remains unresolved by May 30, Shawn will delay the renewal package. I need the status update to say what is guaranteed under contract and what is a target.

Shawn
